00020 
00021 package jelatine.cldc.io;
00022 
00023 import java.util.Hashtable;
00024 
00035 public class URL {
00036 
00037     String name; 
00038     String scheme; 
00039     String target; 
00040     String params; 
00045     public URL(String name) throws IllegalArgumentException {
00046         this.name = name;
00047 
00048         int shemeEndIndex = name.indexOf(":");
00049 
00050         if (shemeEndIndex == -1) {
00051             throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid URL");
00052         }
00053 
00054         scheme = name.substring(0, shemeEndIndex);
00055         int paramsStartIndex = name.indexOf(";");
00056 
00057         if (paramsStartIndex == -1) {
00058             target = name.substring(shemeEndIndex + 1);
00059         } else {
00060             target = name.substring(shemeEndIndex + 1, paramsStartIndex);
00061             params = name.substring(paramsStartIndex);
00062         }
00063     }
00064 
00070     public Hashtable getParamsMap(String params) {
00071         Hashtable map = new Hashtable();
00072 
00073         int paramStartIndex = -1;
00074 
00075         while ((paramStartIndex = params.indexOf(';', paramStartIndex + 1))
00076                != -1)
00077         {
00078             int paramEndIndex = params.indexOf(';', paramStartIndex + 1);
00079             String keyValueString;
00080 
00081             if (paramEndIndex == -1) {
00082                 keyValueString = params.substring(paramStartIndex + 1);
00083             } else {
00084                 keyValueString = params.substring(paramStartIndex + 1,
00085                                                   paramEndIndex);
00086             }
00087 
00088             int equalIndex = keyValueString.indexOf('=');
00089 
00090             if (equalIndex == -1) {
00091                 break;
00092             }
00093 
00094             String key = keyValueString.substring(0, equalIndex);
00095             String value = keyValueString.substring(equalIndex + 1);
00096             map.put(key, value);
00097         }
00098 
00099         return map;
00100     }
00101 
00105     public String getName() {
00106         return name;
00107     }
00108 
00112     public String getScheme() {
00113         return scheme;
00114     }
00115 
00119     public String getTarget() {
00120         return target;
00121     }
00122 
00126     public String getParams() {
00127         return params;
00128     }
00129 
00130 }
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:25 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
